nl: Rank customers within each city by their signup date
gold_sql: SELECT name, city, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY city ORDER BY signup_date) AS signup_rank FROM customers

nl: Find the top 2 most recently signed up customers in each city
gold_sql: SELECT name, city, signup_date FROM (SELECT name, city, signup_date, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY city ORDER BY signup_date DESC) AS rnk FROM customers) t WHERE rnk <= 2

nl: Rank products within each category by price from lowest to highest
gold_sql: SELECT name, category, price, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price ASC) AS price_rank FROM products

nl: Show the most expensive product in each category
gold_sql: SELECT name, category, price FROM (SELECT name, category, price, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY price DESC) AS rnk FROM products) t WHERE rnk = 1

nl: Assign row numbers to orders within each customer sorted by date
gold_sql: SELECT order_id, customer_id, order_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY order_date ASC) AS order_seq FROM orders
